creator: m.seaman@infracaninophile.co.uk
text:
Fix: Routine bug-fix upgrade to the latest release version.

Announce Message: 

  "Welcome to phpMyAdmin 3.0.1, a bugfix-only version. The 3.0 series
   requires PHP 5.2+ and MySQL 5.0+.

   Details and downloads on http://phpmyadmin.net.

   Marc Delisle, for the team"

ChangeLog:

   http://sourceforge.net/project/shownotes.php?release_id=635208
   http://www.phpmyadmin.net/home_page/downloads.php?relnotes=0
